comment: E41 (D244) save-shape manifest — structural enforcement of the architecture law: 'save changes need a _SAVE_VER bump WITH idempotent lazy migration, or be purely additive.' Build gate 4h (tools/build.mjs) extracts each function below from its source file, hashes it (whitespace-collapsed sha256, first 16 hex chars), and FAILS the build on any drift from this file. To change the save shape: make the bump-or-additive decision consciously, then update the hash(es) here in the SAME commit — the diff on this file is the audit trail. saveVer must equal _SAVE_VER in build/base.html. Purely additive fields riding inside settings/campaign never touch these functions and never trip the gate.
